expectations.text: References PipelineContext.from_config() or imports from paper_tool
expectations.evidence: Only shows CLI commands (uv run paper-tool add); no Python imports or PipelineContext usage

expectations.text: Mentions download_paper() or composable pipeline step functions
expectations.evidence: Only references the monolithic paper-tool CLI, no composable function mentions

expectations.text: Explains what the pipeline does (download, extract, analyze, write to Notion)

expectations.text: Response is actionable with importable/callable Python code
expectations.evidence: Only provides bash CLI commands, no Python code
